[39;49m[K[1m[2m› [22m[22mAgent execution structured interaction is mandatory for this execution.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - The owning Entity is Task 'implementation/09-documentation-and-final-cleanup-verify'.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Mission observes your stdout and parses strict one-line owner-addressed signal markers deterministically.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Every structured state signal must start at the beginning of a stdout line with task:: followed[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  immediately by strict JSON.[39m[49m[0m

[39;49m[K  - Do not use prose as a substitute for structured state signals; prose is only explanatory output.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Use a fresh eventId for every distinct signal. Reusing an eventId is treated as a duplicate.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Keep every marker on one line. Malformed, oversized, stderr, or wrong-execution markers are rejected or[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  recorded only as diagnostics.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - Completion and ready-for-verification markers are claims, not deterministic verification authority.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  Use this exact execution field in every marker:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - agentExecutionId: 09-documentation-and-final-cleanup-verify-codex-cf58e17c[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  Supported signal payloads:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - progress: Progress (progress)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - needs_input: Needs Input (input-request)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - blocked: Blocked (claim)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - ready_for_verification: Ready For Verification (claim)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - completed_claim: Completed Claim (claim)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - failed_claim: Failed Claim (claim)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  - message: Message (audit-message)[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  When requesting input, emit needs_input with a question and choices. Use kind "fixed" for selectable choices[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  with label/value, and kind "manual" for freeform operator input with label and optional placeholder.[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  Example marker:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  task::{"version":1,"agentExecutionId":"09-documentation-and-final-cleanup-verify-codex-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  cf58e17c","eventId":"replace-with-unique-event-id","signal":{"type":"progress","summary":"Working on the[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  next implementation step."}}[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  Needs-input marker example:[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  task::{"version":1,"agentExecutionId":"09-documentation-and-final-cleanup-verify-codex-[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  cf58e17c","eventId":"replace-with-unique-event-id","signal":{"type":"needs_input","question":"Which[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  verification path should I run next?","choices":[{"kind":"fixed","label":"Run focused[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  tests","value":"focused-tests"},{"kind":"fixed","label":"Run full package check","value":"package-check"},[39m[49m[0m
[39;49m[K  {"kind":"manual","label":"Other","placeholder":"Describe the command or decision."}]}}[39m[49m[0m
